user_query: I am organizing a charity event and need captivating facts about numbers, NBA teams, and players. Retrieve a random mathematical fact, a trivia fact, details about all NBA players, and a Chuck Norris joke.

TaskList.description: Retrieve a random mathematical fact to present to attendees.
Fetch a random trivia fact to keep the attendees entertained.
Get details about all NBA players for statistical insights and discussions during the event.
Retrieve a Chuck Norris joke to add humor to the event.
